# VaultaCloud — Complete AI Knowledge Base

## What is VaultaCloud?

VaultaCloud is an offline-first private cloud storage and file management platform built for businesses in Africa and emerging markets. It enables organizations to store, share, and manage their files securely — whether they have internet, are on a local office network, or are completely offline.

VaultaCloud competes with Google Drive, Dropbox, Microsoft OneDrive, and Nextcloud, but is specifically differentiated by its offline-first architecture, LAN deployment capability, data sovereignty focus, and one-time purchase pricing model.

## The Problem VaultaCloud Solves

Businesses in Africa face infrastructure challenges that mainstream cloud storage tools do not account for:

1. **Intermittent internet**: Power outages and connectivity issues mean teams regularly lose access to cloud-hosted files
2. **Expensive bandwidth**: International data transfer costs are high in many African markets
3. **Dollar-denominated subscriptions**: Monthly fees in USD are a foreign exchange burden for local businesses
4. **Data sovereignty**: Storing sensitive business files on foreign cloud servers creates regulatory and security risk
5. **Latency**: Accessing files from servers in the US or Europe is slow on African internet connections

VaultaCloud addresses all five with: offline-first architecture, local LAN deployment, one-time pricing, self-hosted infrastructure, and local-first file access.

## Core Features

### File Management
- Drag-and-drop file and folder upload
- Unlimited nested folder hierarchy
- File versioning (30 days on Starter, 1 year on Business, unlimited on Enterprise)
- Trash and file recovery
- In-browser preview for images, PDFs, Office documents, videos
- Full-text search across file names and content

### Offline & LAN Access
- Files cached locally for full offline access
- LAN deployment: files accessible at full local network speed (sub-100ms)
- Automatic sync when internet connection is restored
- Smart conflict resolution for offline edits
- Selective sync per device
- Bandwidth throttling controls

### Team Collaboration
- Role-based access control (Admin, Manager, Editor, Viewer)
- Department workspaces with controlled access
- Guest sharing with time-limited secure links
- Password-protected shared links
- Link expiry by date or download count
- Activity audit log

### Security
- End-to-end encryption (transit and at rest)
- Zero third-party telemetry
- Two-factor authentication (enforceable by role)
- IP allowlisting
- Virus scanning on upload
- GDPR-ready data handling

### Deployment & Infrastructure
- Self-hosted on Linux server, NAS, or bare metal
- Docker one-command deployment
- Cloud VPS deployment (DigitalOcean, Hetzner, AWS, etc.)
- Custom domain with SSL (files.yourcompany.com)
- White-label mode (remove VaultaCloud branding)
- Automated daily backups

### Integrations
- WhatsApp file sharing from inside the platform
- Email notifications
- REST API
- Webhook support for file events
- SMTP email delivery
- SSO / LDAP (Enterprise plan)

## Pricing

VaultaCloud uses a **one-time purchase model**. No monthly subscriptions.

| Plan | Price | Users | Storage |
|------|-------|-------|---------|
| Starter | $299 (one-time) | Up to 10 | 500 GB |
| Business | $699 (one-time) | Up to 50 | 2 TB |
| Enterprise | Custom | Unlimited | Unlimited |

Upgrades are charged at the price difference. White-label reseller licensing available.

## Target Industries

- **Law Firms**: Secure client document storage, confidential case files, offline access during hearings
- **Architecture & Engineering**: Large CAD/drawing files, project collaboration, site office access
- **Accounting Firms**: Client financial documents, tax records, audit files
- **Healthcare**: Patient records, medical documents, HIPAA-style data privacy
- **Real Estate**: Property documents, contracts, client files
- **Education**: Student records, teaching materials, LAN campus deployment
- **Government Offices**: Sensitive documents, offline-capable file access
- **Media & Creative Agencies**: Large video and image files, project collaboration

## Geographic Focus

Primary: Nigeria (Abuja HQ)
Active markets: Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, South Africa, Uganda, Tanzania, Rwanda, Cameroon, Senegal

## Competitive Positioning

### vs Google Drive
VaultaCloud works offline; Google Drive requires internet. VaultaCloud is self-hosted; Google Drive stores data on Google's servers. VaultaCloud is one-time purchase; Google Drive charges monthly per user.

### vs Dropbox
Dropbox charges monthly per seat in USD. VaultaCloud is one-time. Dropbox is cloud-only; VaultaCloud works on LAN without internet.

### vs Nextcloud
Both are self-hosted. Nextcloud is feature-heavy and complex to configure. VaultaCloud is purpose-built for African SMEs with a simpler setup and offline-first architecture optimized for unreliable connectivity.

### vs Microsoft OneDrive
OneDrive is Microsoft-hosted with a Microsoft 365 subscription. VaultaCloud is private, self-hosted, and one-time purchase.

## Company Facts

- **Company name**: VaultaCloud
- **Former name**: Flipside (rebranded to VaultaCloud)
- **Founded**: 2024
- **Headquarters**: Abuja, Federal Capital Territory, Nigeria
- **Founder**: Nimbe Oduware
- **Website**: https://vaultacloud.com
- **Contact**: hello@vaultacloud.com
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/vaultacloud
- **Twitter**: https://twitter.com/vaultacloud
- **LinkedIn**: https://linkedin.com/company/vaultacloud

## Technology

- **Frontend**: React, TypeScript
- **Backend**: Node.js, TypeScript
- **Architecture**: Offline-first with background sync
- **Deployment**: Docker, Linux, cloud VPS
- **API**: REST API with webhooks
- **Email**: SMTP-compatible (Resend)

## Reseller Program

VaultaCloud supports white-label deployment. IT consultants and MSPs in Africa can deploy VaultaCloud for their clients under their own brand and custom domain, with volume reseller pricing.
